# summarise_cohort_attrition { #cdmconnector.summarise_cohort_attrition }

```python
summarise_cohort_attrition(cohort, cdm=None, *, cohort_id=None)
```

Summarise attrition for cohorts.

Reads cohort_attrition metadata and formats it as a SummarisedResult with
number_records, number_subjects, excluded_records, excluded_subjects per
attrition step.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name      | Type                                          | Description   | Default    |
|-----------|-----------------------------------------------|---------------|------------|
| cohort    | Cohort table with cohort_attrition attribute. |               | _required_ |
| cdm       | Optional Cdm for cdm_name.                    |               | `None`     |
| cohort_id | Optional cohort_definition_id(s) to include.  |               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |
